message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

title Keyple 2.0 - Adapter of keyple-service-resource-java-lib - 2.0.0 (21/06/2021)

legend top
  Colors legend :
  * External public API references :
  * <color:green>calypsonet-terminal-reader-java-api</color>
  * <color:red>keyple-service-java-lib</color>
end legend

package "org.eclipse.keyple.core.service.resource" {

  class "final CardResourceServiceProvider" as CardResourceServiceProvider <<C>> {
    ...
  }

  class "<<CardResourceService>>\n<<PluginObserverSpi>>\n<<CardReaderObserverSpi>>\nfinal CardResourceServiceAdapter" as CardResourceServiceAdapter <<C>> {
    .. CardResourceServiceAdapter getInstance () ..
    .. String getCardResourceInfo (CardResource cardResource) ..
    --
    .. ReaderManagerAdapter getReaderManager (<color:green>Reader</color> reader) ..
    .. void registerPoolCardResource (CardResource cardResource, <color:red>PoolPlugin</color> poolPlugin) ..
    .. void configure (CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter configurator) ..
    == CardResourceService ==
    ◇ CardResourceServiceConfigurator getConfigurator()
    ◇ MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator getMinimalConfigurator()
    ◇ void start ()
    ◇ void stop ()
    ◇ CardResource getCardResource (String cardResourceProfileName)
    ◇ CardResource getCardResource ()
    ◇ void releaseCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    ◇ void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    == PluginObserverSpi ==
    ◇ void onPluginEvent (<color:green>PluginEvent</color> pluginEvent)
    == CardReaderObserverSpi ==
    ◇ void onReaderEvent (<color:green>CardReaderEvent</color> readerEvent)
  }

  CardResourceServiceProvider ..> CardResourceServiceAdapter : ▼ provide

  class "final CardProfileManagerAdapter" as CardProfileManagerAdapter <<C>> {
    ▲ CardProfileManagerAdapter(CardProfile cardProfile,\n    CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter globalConfiguration)
    --
    ◇ void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    ◇ void onReaderConnected (ReaderManagerAdapter readerManager)
    ◇ void onCardInserted (ReaderManagerAdapter readerManager)
    ◇ CardResource getCardResource ()
  }

  class "▲ final ReaderManagerAdapter" as ReaderManagerAdapter <<C>> {
    ▲ ReaderManagerAdapter (<color:green>Reader</color> reader, <color:red>Plugin</color> plugin,\n    ReaderConfiguratorSpi readerConfiguratorSpi, int usageTimeoutMillis)
    --
    ● <color:green>Reader</color> getReader ()
    ▲ <color:red>Plugin</color> getPlugin ()
    ▲ Set<CardResource> getCardResources ()
    ▲ boolean isActive ()
    --
    ▲ void activate ()
    ▲ CardResource matches (CardResourceProfileExtension extension)
    ▲ boolean lock (CardResource cardResource, CardResourceProfileExtension extension)
    ▲ void unlock ()
    ▲ void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
  }

  class "<<CardResource>>\nfinal CardResourceAdapter" as CardResourceAdapter <<C>> {
    ▲ CardResource (<color:green>CardReader</color> reader, <color:green>SmartCard</color> smartCard)
    == CardResource ==
    ● <color:green>CardReader</color> getReader ()
    ● <color:green>SmartCard</color> getSmartCard ()
  }

  class "<<CardResourceServiceConfigurator>>\n<<MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator>>\n<<AllocationStrategyStep>>\n<<UsageTimeoutStep>>\n<<PluginStep>>\n<<PluginMonitoringStep>>\n<<PoolAllocationStrategyStep>>\n<<PoolPluginStep>>\n<<AllocationTimingParameterStep>>\n<<ProfileStep>>\n<<ProfileParameterStep>>\n<<ConfigurationStep>>\nfinal CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter" as CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter <<C>> {
    ▲ CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter ()
    == CardResourceServiceConfigurator ==
    ...
    == MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator ==
    ...
  }

  CardResourceServiceAdapter "1" -- "1..N" CardProfileManagerAdapter
  CardResourceServiceAdapter "1" -- "0..N" ReaderManagerAdapter
  CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter "1" -- CardProfileManagerAdapter

  CardProfileManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : ▲ create for pool plugin
  ReaderManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : ▲ create for regular plugin

  CardProfileManagerAdapter "0..N" -- CardResourceAdapter
  ReaderManagerAdapter "0..N" -- CardResourceAdapter
}

class "CardResourceServiceAdapter" as ExtCardResourceServiceAdapter <<C>> #white
class "CardResourceAdapter" as ExtCardResourceAdapter <<C>> #white
class "CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter" as ExtCardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter <<C>> #white
class "ReaderManagerAdapter" as ExtReaderManagerAdapter <<C>> #white
class "CardProfileManagerAdapter" as ExtCardProfileManagerAdapter <<C>> #white

@enduml
```
